channel.title: Game Changer Animated
channel.description: Latest releases from Game Changer Animated on Dropout.tv

item.title: I'm Hungie
item.description:
Izzy has to order a pizza and say "I'm Hungie" 16 times. Can she do it?

Duration: 01:04

Tags: Game Changer Animated, Game Changer, animation, game shows, challenges, competitions, improv, mad skills, unscripted, embarrassing, cringeworthy, hungry, pizza, sam reich, izzy roland, erika ishii, becca scott, yukfoo animation, trevor dedekind, alex dron
